text:
Atlas Terrain Robotics — Leadership

We build autonomous ground vehicles for mining and agriculture, with 260 employees across Munich and Krakow.

Nadia Petrova — Chief People Officer
Nadia joined in March from a Series-C climate startup and is standing up the people function for our next growth phase. She recently posted about doubling the Krakow engineering hub.

Samuel Obi, Chief Financial Officer
Samuel leads finance, procurement, and back-office systems.

Lena Fischer - IT Director
Lena owns internal systems, security, and the integration layer between field telemetry and business tools.

Marco Bell — Lead Field Robotics Engineer
Marco heads the autonomy test program.

Media contact: nadia.petrova@atlasterrain.com. Supplier onboarding: samuel.obi@atlasterrain.com.
Atlas Terrain announced a EUR 40M Series D in June and plans to add 80 roles across both sites this year.
